IsA: It is a market in which one person or company is the only supplier of a particular good or service.
It is a single seller in economics.
It is a business entity that has significant market power in law.
It is a market situation in which there is only one buyer.
It is a situation in which one or a few entities have market power and therefore interact with their customers or suppliers in ways that distort the market.
HasA: It has a lack of economic competition to produce a particular thing.
It has a lack of viable substitute goods.
It has the possibility of a high monopoly price well above the seller's marginal cost.
It has a high monopoly profit.
It has monopsony control of a sector of a market.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by a lack of economic competition to produce a particular thing.
It is characterized by a lack of viable substitute goods.
It is characterized by the possibility of a high monopoly price well above the seller's marginal cost.
It is characterized by a high monopoly profit.
It is characterized by a lack of viable substitute goods.
UsedFor: It is used for gaining the ability to raise prices or exclude competitors.
It is used for charging overly high prices.
It is used for providing an incentive to invest in a risky venture.
It is used for enriching a domestic interest group.
It is used for comparing the price-fixing methods across market structures.
CausedBy: It is caused by mergers and integrations.
It is caused by forming naturally.
It is caused by being established by a government.
It is caused by economies of scale.
It is caused by capital requirements.
Affects: It affects the value of a product to other people.
KnownFor: It is known for a lack of economic competition.
It is known for a lack of viable substitute goods.
It is known for the possibility of a high monopoly price.
It is known for high monopoly profits.
It is known for having significant market power.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with unfair price raises.
It is associated with potential adverse effects.
It is associated with abusive behavior.
It is associated with legal sanctions.
NamedAfter: It is named after Greek words 'mónos' meaning 'single, alone' and 'pōleîn' meaning 'to sell'.
About: It is about the process by which a company gains the ability to raise prices or exclude competitors.
It is about normative aspects of economic competition.
It is about economics of regulation.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by government concerns over potential adverse effects.
It was influenced by competition laws.
It was influenced by the law of market demand.
It was influenced by economies of scale.
It was influenced by capital requirements.
Influenced: It influenced the value of a product to other people.
